content:
Hi slope.pass2916

You don't need to align the QR code with anything. Just having the full QR code within the camera viewing window is normally sufficient to be detected.

Some users have reported similar challenges reading the QR code. This could be down to a number of factors. Desktop screen reflectiveness, brightness or contrast. Others have reported success after changing TB desktop's theme between light/dark mode. Your phones OS or camera app could also be a potential factor.

You can try scanning the QR code on the below page as a test to see if the camera picks it up. https://support.mozilla.org/en-US/kb/thunderbird-android-import

If you can't get the QR code to scan, you can always add the account by type the details into the apps setup wizard.
